title: Gojarna
subtitle: Eterna · the Northern Highlands · eternal winter

kingdoms.name: The Barren Harbour
kingdoms.sub: Only the bare necessity of surviving these winters

notes.title: A hidden continent beyond the Northern Islands
links: Written in old books and mythologies
Protected by ocean and harsh weather

notes.title: Written in old books and mythologies
Protected by ocean and harsh weather
Eternal Winter — it lives up to its name
Blizzard monstrosities grow louder
Before the races departed to horizons
The catastrophic event
Sailors looking down, carrying burdens
Mongers waiting for the next customer
Nothing much here — only survival
links: Eternal Winter — it lives up to its name

kingdoms.name: The Snow Orc Cliffs
kingdoms.sub: Milder in temperament, deeper in wounds

notes.title: Rough and burly, milder in temperament
No warpaths carried here
Huts entrenched in the stone cliffs
Tell me what you need, and get out quick
They refuse to make eye contact
Children fall silent when you near
Tea with the Elder Orc
The taste of sweet jasmine
They are afraid of themselves
links: They face their violent instincts daily

notes.title: They face their violent instincts daily
Deep wounds in the generations
links: The civil war of the Orc clans

notes.title: The civil war of the Orc clans
The Greyskins of Ash
links: They ate one of their own kind
The vengeance of the Snow Orcs

notes.title: They ate one of their own kind
The vengeance of the Snow Orcs
links: None of the others stepped forward

notes.title: None of the others stepped forward
Severed contact with the clans
Isolation became the answer

kingdoms.name: The Troll Wastes
kingdoms.sub: Most of North Gojarna is theirs

notes.title: Vicious — they will not hesitate
Tusk size and curve dictate rank
Born in burrows, trained from birth
Swords for the berserkers
links: Teeth of prey on the hilt

notes.title: Crude, disposable Frost-Iron
Teeth of prey on the hilt
Lances for the strategists
Savage orders, lust for victory
The matriarchs lead the packs
They pierce from the skies
Coordinated violence
Rugs of wooly mammoths and sabretooths
The heads of people on carved walls
Intelligent races, rarely hunted, but...

kingdoms.name: Lands of the Pale
kingdoms.sub: Few in number, they reign in information

notes.title: The Pale reign in information and culture
Borders born of necessity
The tower of smoke, a beacon
links: A dragon's mouth faced to the sky

notes.title: Frost-iron with a copper hue
A dragon's mouth faced to the sky
Each layer a Giant of the world
Astra the Proud
Uldor the Tame
Jalaaga the Curious
Zaarni, the Cold
links: May Zaarni carry us on our weighted way

notes.title: Zaarni prefers isolation
links: The cost of surviving harsh environments

notes.title: The cost of surviving harsh environments
May Zaarni carry us on our weighted way
A bronze Sage, head snapped off
links: Holes shaped like a smiling face

notes.title: Holes shaped like a smiling face
links: As if it was staring back

notes.title: As if it was staring back
An ornate cane — but which Sage?
Curse stories at dusk
links: The snow will pull you under
Don't leave food, or it will eat you

notes.title: The snow will pull you under
Don't leave food, or it will eat you
links: Mom, do ghosts even get hungry?

notes.title: Mom, do ghosts even get hungry?

kingdoms.name: The Vapour Caverns
kingdoms.sub: The Fourth Pillar — the Dead, the Memory

notes.title: Where vapours tell of leaking moments
Covering, or protecting?
A long lost civilisation
links: Etchings of wolves living with children
Not a single living soul inside

notes.title: Etchings of wolves living with children
Not a single living soul inside
A vast network of family burrows
Stalagmites left to light the way
The Guide and his intricate pipe
links: Etched with the symbol of Zaarni

notes.title: Etched with the symbol of Zaarni
Faces made of mist
links: Fragments of our lives, not spirits
Blue when calm, vermillion in violence

notes.title: Fragments of our lives, not spirits

notes.title: Blue when calm, vermillion in violence

Neutral ground for all Pillars
